verses.2: “Truly then you are the people, And with you wisdom will die!
verses.3: “But I have intelligence as well as you; I am not inferior to you. And who does not know such things as these?
verses.4: “I am a joke to my friends, The one who called on God and He answered him; The just and blameless man is a joke.
verses.5: “He who is at ease holds disaster in contempt, As prepared for those whose feet slip.
verses.6: “The tents of the destroyers prosper, And those who provoke God are secure, Whom God brings into their power.
verses.7: “But just ask the animals, and have them teach you; And the birds of the sky, and have them tell you.
verses.8: “Or speak to the earth, and have it teach you; And have the fish of the sea tell you.
verses.9: “Who among all these does not know That the hand of the LORD has done this,
verses.10: In whose hand is the life of every living thing, And the breath of all mankind?
verses.11: “Does the ear not put words to the test, As the palate tastes its food?
verses.12: “Wisdom is with the aged, And with long life comes understanding.
verses.13: “Wisdom and might are with Him; Advice and understanding belong to Him.
verses.14: “Behold, He tears down, and it cannot be rebuilt; He imprisons a person, and there is no release.
verses.15: “Behold, He restrains the waters, and they dry up; And He sends them out, and they inundate the earth.
verses.16: “Strength and sound wisdom are with Him. One who goes astray and one who leads astray belong to Him.
verses.17: “He makes advisers walk barefoot And makes fools of judges.
verses.18: “He undoes the binding of kings, And ties a loincloth around their waist.
verses.19: “He makes priests walk barefoot, And overthrows the secure ones.
verses.20: “He deprives the trusted ones of speech, And takes away the discernment of the elders.
verses.21: “He pours contempt on nobles, And loosens the belt of the strong.
verses.22: “He reveals mysteries from the darkness, And brings the deep darkness into light.
verses.23: “He makes the nations great, then destroys them; He enlarges the nations, then leads them away.
verses.24: “He deprives the leaders of the earth’s people of intelligence And makes them wander in a pathless wasteland.
verses.25: “They grope in darkness with no light, And He makes them stagger like a drunken person.
